body:
## Summary

- Integrates the green general-planner foundation from #677 and adds a scratch-repository self-coding scenario under `examples/self-coding/`.
- Captures real Agent CLI stream events, Formal AI request traces, the generated plan, deterministic session JSON, and the resulting verified diff.
- Adds byte-for-byte offline replay coverage and runs the scenario in the existing real Agent CLI E2E job.
- Documents the standard command sequence in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.

## Reproduction

```bash
cargo build --release --bin formal-ai
examples/self-coding/run.sh
cargo test self_coding_session_replays
```

The scratch issue requests `self-coding-result.txt` containing `self-coding=passed`; the captured diff and verification command prove the change completed.

## Verification

- `cargo test`: 1,519 passed, 2 ignored
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `cargo fmt --check`
- real Agent CLI ↔ Formal AI replay: 183 valid stream-JSON events
- changed-file size thresholds checked directly (`rust-script` is unavailable locally)

## Upstream gap discovered

The required outer command, `solve ISSUE_URL --tool agent --model formal-ai`, is rejected by Hive Mind 2.5.2 before Agent CLI starts because `formal-ai` is absent from its validation map. The real dispatch failure is committed in the case study and tracked as [link-assistant/hive-mind#2059](https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/2059). The deterministic inner Agent CLI ↔ Formal AI loop is complete and CI-replayable; the outer live entry remains gated by that upstream fix.

Fixes #655
